conflicts.description: Jin-seo gives two incompatible versions of her brother's 2034 death: Chapter 8 describes a triathlon cycling-stage cascade in the Asia-Pacific qualifiers; Chapter 12 describes a 1500-meter race collapse after an emergency shutdown delay.
conflicts.canonical_value: Jin-seo's brother died in a 2034 enhancement cascade failure; sport, event mechanics, and incident specifics remain unspecified in canon.
conflicts.resolution_note: The chapters conflict on sport, failure pattern, and scene details. Chapter 8's version is more causally embedded in her access-code argument, but the existing continuity sheet and context pack support only the generic 2034 cascade death. Canon therefore stays at the minimally shared fact rather than promoting disputed specifics.
